digest.component_or_area: auto-lander failure/edge paths in the core-loop service
propositions: On a post-rebase Verified -1, the bot performs one bounded auto-recheck on the same patchset before recording ci_failed and handing the stack back.
On a POST /rebase 409, the bot records a needs_rebase outcome and removes Autosubmit from all changes in the stack, never using allow_conflicts.
The bot must never land a partial/inconsistent stack and never evict a change from within a stack; failure returns the whole stack to its owning agent.
Only needs_rebase markers are persisted (keyed by change_id + patchset_SHA and self-invalidating); merged/ci_failed/review_failed are derived live from Gerrit as a reconstruct cache.
Outcome is recorded before Autosubmit removal, label-removal 404/409 is a no-op, and unacknowledged records re-drive removal to completion on restart for idempotency.
